raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provided a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, significantly improving the draft's structure and clarity.",
    "R1.7": "While the agent flagged some missing citations and references, it did not audit every load-bearing citation or provide bibliographic precision for all missing key works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marked confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation, but could have been more explicit in its language to better convey the degree of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no drift or scope issues.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the output, and it identified some potential issues in the original draft.",
    "RX.5": "While the agent provided some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, not every change was annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, significantly improving the draft's structure and clarity.
rationale.R1.7: While the agent flagged some missing citations and references, it did not audit every load-bearing citation or provide bibliographic precision for all missing key works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation, but could have been more explicit in its language to better convey the degree of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no drift or scope issues.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the output, and it identified some potential issues in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provided some annotations for non-cosmetic changes, not every change was annotated with source and reason.
